pages.text: $(o)"One second faster than the enemy, and victory is mandatory."$()$(br2)$(#FFEE00)Stormcaller$()'s entire philosophy in one word: $(l)swift$().

pages.title: Creed
pages.text: $(l)Stormcaller$()'s three steps:$(br2)1. $(l)Sight is strike$()$(br)2. $(l)Strike is finish$()$(br)3. $(l)Finish is the next opening$()$(br2)Primary element: $(l)Lightning$(); minor affinities: $(l)Wind$(), $(l)Sonic$().

pages.title: History
pages.text: Born at the cradle of the $(l)Storm-King Writ$() — a plateau locked under perpetual thunder. The earliest members were lightning-couriers; they discovered that under extreme voltage, even reaction time accelerates.$(br2)Today, Stormcallers measure pride in "decision time". A trained Stormcaller finishes casting before the enemy's blade leaves its sheath.
